raw_consumer_statement: I provided police report number and pictures to seller. Macys refused to refund for XXXX orders not received and XXXX ordes that the liquid spilled in transit and I asked macys to cancel the XXXX and XXXX order when the first XXXX spilled in transit and they did not Orders were placed from XXXX 2024. Police dept in XXXX pa do not provide police report they provide police report number and ask that the company reach out to them if they want a copy of police report. I provided phone number to the XXXX pa police department and address to macys.
